zh.lifeSummary: 當Alicia de Radcliffe於1300年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，她的父親Robert Radcliffe28歲，母親Margaret Shoresworth30歲。她於1324年與John de Hulton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alicia de Radcliffe于1300年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，她的父亲Robert Radcliffe28岁，母亲Margaret Shoresworth30岁。她于1324年与John de Hulton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

variants.name: Alisha
meanings: Modern Latinate form of   Alice .  It was borne by the British ballerina  Alicia Markova  (born  Lilian Alicia Marks ,  1910–2004 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Alicia de Radcliffe was born in 1300, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Radcliffe, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Shoresworth, was 30. She married John de Hulton in 1324, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1358, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alicia de Radcliffe est née en 1300, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Radcliffe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Shoresworth, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John de Hulton en 1324, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1358, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alicia de Radcliffe 1300 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Radcliffe 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Shoresworth 30. Sie hat 1324 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom John de Hulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 58 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alicia de Radcliffe è nata il nel 1300 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Radcliffe, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Shoresworth, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John de Hulton nel 1324, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1358, all'età di 58 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alicia de Radcliffe(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Radcliffe(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Shoresworth(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 John de Hulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alicia de Radcliffe родилась в 1300 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Radcliffe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Shoresworth, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Hulton в 1324 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1358 г. в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alicia de Radcliffe nació en 1300, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Radcliffe, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Shoresworth, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John de Hulton en 1324, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1358, a la edad de 58 años.
